visualization.title: Scholarship counts by type for each semester type

resultRaw.sql: SELECT scholarship_type AS scholarship_type, semester_type AS semester_type, COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count FROM public.scholarships GROUP BY scholarship_type, semester_type ORDER BY semester_type, scholarship_type;
